acceptanceReviewed.criterion: The checker validates the generic M3 fixture and its negative self-tests.
The checker rejects unsupported metric claims without evidence artifact roles.
The Rust protocol validation mirrors artifact path hygiene and unsupported metric-claim checks.
The explicit artifact mode validates referenced evidence paths for future result artifacts.
The checker is included in the local and CI quality gate through just check.
No live cross-device or credential-dependent behavior is claimed.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Artifact-schema and evidence hygiene only; no live cross-device validation is required or claimed for this node.
